auth: NONE — public market-data endpoint (verified: HTTP 200 with no signature and no credential)
tool: read-only public GET (manual curl); NO orders placed, NO credentials used
note: C-next-2: real, provenanced trade prints for paper-fill TRADE-THROUGH realism (spec 11). The prior blocker assumed the only trade source was the authenticated WS `trade` channel (which needs creds AND a busy demo market — prior captures were quiet). This endpoint, GET /trade-api/v2/markets/trades, is PUBLIC/unauthenticated, so a real recorded trade-print stream is obtainable credential-free. Consumed by crates/fortuna-paper/tests/recorded_public_trades.rs, which drives PaperVenue::apply_public_trade with the REAL recorded price (yes_price_dollars 0.0300 = 3 cents) and quantity (count_fp, fractional) — never a synthetic fill. The single real price (3c) proves the strict-through rule by varying OUR resting order's limit: a 3c print is strictly THROUGH a buy at 4c (fills, haircut applied), exactly AT a buy at 3c (a touch — must NOT fill), and away from a buy at 2c (must NOT fill).
